response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, mentoring abilities, and modern development practices, this is a fundamental mismatch for the role. The position requires 8-12 years of C++ expertise with industrial automation focus; this candidate's last C++ experience was 6 months in 2014-2015, with the past decade entirely in web development (TypeScript, Node.js, React). No evidence of IEC 62443 security standards, industrial IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA), or industrial automation domain knowledge.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience with demonstrated mastery across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record of mentoring, teaching workshops, and organizing code-quality initiatives (code dojos, public talks)
Solid foundation in agile practices, TDD, CI/CD, and event-driven architecture (D Lang microservices at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Last C++ experience was 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015; no C++ work in the past decade despite this being the core technical requirement
Recent 8+ years focused entirely on web/cloud development (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS); C++ not listed in skills section
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT development, IEC 62443 security standards, industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, IEC 104, DNP 3.0, OPC UA), or multi-threaded systems engineering
